name: Dragon Wannabe - Rikki
description:
"Tody on medium gear, wat happens when taste exhoost fume?"

- Jeremiah, Bottom Gear.

My gay followers, you may finally feast. I know it's been nothing but girls for a while, but you guys can finally stop starving.

The intro is major NSFW, this is a smut bot he's literally doing what he is in the image.

Anywho, this little kobold is obsessed with the thought of becoming, or at least being with a dragon. Unfortunately, dragons want nothing to do with kobolds, so he's stuck with his imagination. Luckily for him, genuine dragon semen is fairly cheap, and his favorite dildo is modeled after a dragon...
